=== 1999-04-07 Pavilhao do Atlantico, Parque das Naçoes, Lisbon, Portugal.txt
===================
===================
===================
Pavilho do Atlntico, Parque das Naes
Lisbon, Portugal
April 7, 1999

No taper info; almost certainly a Schubert recording
No lineage; either LB-1192 or LB-1862

Full Spectrum; well above 20 KHz

00. Announcement [00:55]
01. Roving Gambler (trad.) [04:03]
02. Mr. Tambourine Man [06:08]
03. Masters Of War [05:05]
04. Girl From The North Country [06:06]
05. Tangled Up In Blue [07:34]
06. Tryin' To Get To Heaven [11:02]
07. Maggie's Farm [06:04]
08. Lay Lady Lay [04:46]
09. Blind Willie McTell [06:21]
Total time: [58:07]

10. Just Like A Woman [09:31]
11. Can't Wait [06:47]
12. Like A Rolling Stone [10:39]
13. Love Sick [05:20]
14. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat [05:13]
15. Blowin' In The Wind [04:48]
16. Highway 61 Revisited [08:04]
Total time: [50:25]

Concert # 1075 of The Never-Ending Tour
First concert of the 1999 Europe Spring Tour
1999 concert # 29

Concert # 222 with the 11th Never-Ending Tour Band:

Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
Larry Campbell (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
David Kemper (drums & percussion)

15, 15 acoustic with the band
10 Bob Dylan harmonica
1, 15 Bucky Baxter and Larry Campbell backup vocal

NOTES:
Bob Dylan played acoustic guitar on the live debut of Tryin' To Get To Heaven!
There was a 15 minute break before Maggie's Farm!

Stereo audience recording, 105 minutes
